source_plan: Export to the 'Pipeline Review (Q1)' saved list every deal owned by user_00005 with amount > $50,000 closing this quarter (by 2026-03-31).

steps.intent: Open the pipeline filtered by owner at {{ENV_URL}}/deals?owner=user_00005
List every deal in this view whose amount > $50,000 AND expected_close is between 2026-01-15 and 2026-03-31 (this quarter).
Open the 'Pipeline Review (Q1)' list at {{ENV_URL}}/lists/list_pipeline_review and add the qualifying deal ids via the 'Add to list' form (member_type=deal, comma-separated ids).
